result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (BinderException): Binder Error: No function matches the given name and argument types 'sum(VARCHAR)'. You might need to add explicit type casts.
	Candidate functions:
	sum(DECIMAL) -> DECIMAL
	sum(BOOLEAN) -> HUGEINT
	sum(SMALLINT) -> HUGEINT
	sum(INTEGER) -> HUGEINT
	sum(BIGINT) -> HUGEINT
	sum(HUGEINT) -> HUGEINT
	sum(DOUBLE) -> DOUBLE


LINE 1: ...ELECT TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.OwnerId), '#', '')) AS AgentId, SUM(oli.TotalPrice) AS TotalSales FROM Opportunity AS o...
                                                                      ^"

args.query: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.OwnerId), '#', '')) AS AgentId, SUM(oli.TotalPrice) AS TotalSales FROM Opportunity AS o INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.Id), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(oli.OpportunityId), '#', '')) INNER JOIN Contract AS c ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.ContractID__c), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(c.Id), '#', '')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.OwnerId), '#', '')) AS AgentId, SUM(oli.TotalPrice) AS TotalSales FROM Opportunity AS o INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.Id), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(oli.OpportunityId), '#', '')) INNER JOIN Contract AS c ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.ContractID__c), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(c.Id), '#', '')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.OwnerId), '#', '')) AS AgentId, SUM(CAST(oli.TotalPrice AS DECIMAL)) AS TotalSales FROM Opportunity AS o INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.Id), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(oli.OpportunityId), '#', '')) INNER JOIN Contract AS c ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.ContractID__c), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(c.Id), '#', '')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.OwnerId), '#', '')) AS AgentId, SUM(CAST(oli.TotalPrice AS DECIMAL)) AS TotalSales FROM Opportunity AS o INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.Id), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(oli.OpportunityId), '#', '')) INNER JOIN Contract AS c ON TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(o.ContractID__c), '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(UPPER(c.Id), '#', '')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;
